title: Zero In Bug Bat Battery Powered Kills Flying Insects on Contact, Suitable for Indoor and Outdoor Use, Color Assorted, (Packaging May Vary)
bullet_points: QUICK & EFFECTIVE: Kills mosquitoes, midges and biting flies on contact
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: Ideal for camping, BBQs and picnics
